scripts.build:agent: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('agent/dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p agent/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:agent-tests: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('agent/dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p agent/tsconfig.test.json
scripts.test:agent: npm run build:agent && npm run build:agent-tests && node --test agent/dist-test/tests/*.test.js agent/dist-test/tests/*/*.test.js
scripts.dev: npm run build:agent && swift run OpenScreen
